completed_tasks.name: Implement Redis-backed bloom filter in bloomFilter.ts
Add Redis persistence tests to bloomFilter.test.ts

blockers.description: CR-01: apps/api/.env.prod.example uses ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection but Program.cs reads DATABASE_URL — operators following runbook get API crash at startup
blockers.workaround: Fix the key name in .env.prod.example and update docs/deployment/production-deploy.md line 81

blockers.description: CR-02: saveBloomFilter() has no try/catch in index.ts additionalCleanup — Redis failure at shutdown skips browserPool.closeAll() and all worker.close() calls
blockers.workaround: Wrap await saveBloomFilter() in try/catch in the additionalCleanup callback in index.ts

human_actions_pending.action: Run manual UAT tests documented in docs/MANUAL-UAT.md
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 09 (3 tests: live push, reconnect, visual indicator) and Phase 10 (2 tests: Oracle smoke test, SignalR WSS) — require live local stack and live Oracle Cloud + Vercel deployment

human_actions_pending.action: Fix CR-01 and CR-02 from code review before production deploy
human_actions_pending.context: CR-01 causes API container crash on startup; CR-02 leaks Playwright subprocesses on Redis failure during shutdown

decisions.decision: bloom:filter Redis key with TTL 604800 (7 days)
decisions.rationale: Long enough for any restart cycle; matches BLOOM_KEY_PREFIX='bloom:' in verify-bloom-persistence.sh
After worker.close() drains jobs (all markUrlSeen calls complete), before connection.quit() closes Redis

decisions.decision: loadBloomFilter has try/catch fallback to fresh filter
decisions.rationale: Redis unavailable at startup should not crash crawler — T-10-22 mitigation

decisions.decision: Phase 09 and 10 human UAT approved by owner
decisions.rationale: All automated checks pass; runtime tests require live hardware; deferred to docs/MANUAL-UAT.md

next_action: Fix CR-01 (apps/api/.env.prod.example key name) and CR-02 (try/catch around saveBloomFilter in index.ts) — run /gsd-code-review-fix 10 or fix manually
context_notes: Phase 10 gap closure (Plan 10-06) is fully committed and tested. The code review found 2 critical bugs introduced in earlier Phase 10 plans (not Plan 10-06). Both are pre-deploy fixes. All planning artifacts are committed. Phase 09 and 10 are both marked complete in ROADMAP/STATE. Manual UAT guide is at docs/MANUAL-UAT.md.
